creator: John.Shue@symmetron.com
text:
FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=YES would work if the fetch code wasn't buggy.

The fix to the fetch code can be found in GNATS.  See PR bin/9496.

I believe the fetch code should be fixed instead of putting a workaround into
/etc/make.conf

-john
